title: Ashen + Azalea Wood Set
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen and Azalea Wood Set
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) with [Azalea Wood Set](https://modrinth.com/mod/azalea-wood-set)? Tired of certain blocks using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack above [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) in your load order.

This pack is designed and intended for use with Ashen 16x and Azalea Wood Set.

Credits:

Aim_Boot - [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) resourcepack

Fire-Horse27 - [Azalea Wood Set](https://modrinth.com/mod/azalea-wood-set) mod
